catalog.title: Workspaces
catalog.description: The catalog of containerized desktops, browsers, and applications users can launch.

create.title: Create workspace
create.description: Add a Docker app/desktop or a server-backed (RDP/VNC/SSH) machine — Windows desktops, servers and more.
create.slugHint: URL-safe id; derived from the name if left blank.
create.dockerImageHint: e.g. kasmweb/brave:1.16.0 — creates and links an image so the workspace is launchable.
create.noServers: No servers registered yet. Add one under Infrastructure → Servers.
create.serverHintLong: Pick a registered RDP/VNC/SSH machine — its zone is used automatically.
create.serverRequired: Choose a server for a server-backed workspace.

toasts.launchDescription: Allocating an agent and starting the container.

images.title: Workspace Images
images.description: Container images pulled and cached on agents. New images are pulled automatically when a workspace is first launched.
images.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, registry or tag…

registry.title: Image Registry
registry.description: Connect open-format workspace registries, sync their catalogs, and install workspaces from the marketplace.
registry.liveOnly: Registry management is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live to connect to the API.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.emptyLive: No marketplace apps. Add a registry and sync it.
marketplace.emptyMock: Connect the live backend to browse the marketplace.

toasts.synced: Synced {count, plural, one {# workspace} other {# workspaces}}
